title: Amethyst Platform
description: Survival on the amethyst platform. All you need is an amethyst.
body:
## Will you be able to survive on the amethyst platform of 3x2x3 blocks? Let's find out!
## 

You appear on an amethyst island, without objects - only amethyst around. Get it, make a compressed amethyst block, get 24 amethyst shard from it, make ground amethyst by hitting it against amethyst blocks and keep doing so right up to amethyst mechanisms like cleaner and squeezer! Create a fragment of life and create living creatures with it in the future (not available yet)!

In the future you will be able to create trees, animals, monsters and even a boss (At least it should be in the future, lol)!

Thanks to the achievements, you will learn how to move forward.

In short: if you want to grind, then this mod is for you.

(Made up thanks to the dirt platform mod)

for 1.20.1 
Made in MCreator (cuz i'm stupid)

### **YOU NEED TO: Create a flat world without layers and structures**
